applicability_notes: Unary elementwise SELU activation; 1:1 replacement for torch.nn.functional.selu. No weights; shape-preserving. Also matches the decomposed form scale * (max(0,x) + min(0, alpha*(exp(x)-1))) with scale=1.0507..., alpha=1.6733...

placement_observations.source: unit_test: ttnn.from_torch(..., layout=ttnn.TILE_LAYOUT, memory_config=ttnn.DRAM_MEMORY_CONFIG) before ttnn.selu(tt_in)
